steps.description: Press the F1 key to open the command palette in the Visual Studio Code interface.

Type text into the command palette input field: 'Terminal:Create New Terminal' in the Visual Studio Code interface. Ensure the Command Palette is active, identified by the ">" prefix and selectable options.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selected command "Terminal: Create New Terminal" from the Visual Studio Code Command Palette dropdown.
Click on the terminal input section (bottom pane) to activate the workspace terminal environment at coordinates (600, 534).

Type text: 'open https://dev.teams.microsoft.com' into the integrated terminal within the Visual Studio Code application workspace. The terminal displays prior output, and the command is being typed in a bash shell environment.
Press the "Enter" key to execute the command entered in the terminal within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click inside the "Email or phone" input field on the Microsoft Sign-in page to focus and enable text entry.
Type text "${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}}"  into the email address input field on the Microsoft online login page within the "Sign in" interface.
Click the "Next" button on the Microsoft login page to proceed with the sign-in process after entering an email address.
Type text "${{secret:M365_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD}}" into the password field on the Microsoft login page (URL: login.microsoftonline.com).
Press the "Enter" key to submit the password on the Microsoft login screen and proceed by activating the "Sign in" button.
Click the "Yes" button in the "Stay signed in?" prompt on the Microsoft login page.
